uplink.description: PIR alarm frame: detection event, count=5, sensor active, enclosure closed, 3.0 V sensor rail
uplink._note: In-bounds bytes; expected fields derived from upstream decodeur.js (Produit PIR / postProcessAncienPir) run as the oracle: compteur_pir=5, type_trame=0x08 alarm, capteur_dq Active, ouverture closed, temperature_pir=3000 mV.

uplink.description: PIR counting frame: running count=300, no fresh detection asserted
uplink._note: Oracle: type_trame=0x10 (Trame de comptage), compteur_pir=0x012C=300; counting frame reports count without a detection boolean.

uplink.description: PIR box-opening frame: enclosure open, sensor disabled, count=0
uplink._note: Oracle: type_trame=0x01 box opening, ouverture_boitier=0x00 open, capteur_dq[1]=0x01 disabled.
byte0=0xA0 is not the 0x32 PIR frame this device emits; codec returns an error.
